project.name: 情绪树洞
project.visualSpecExcerpt: Mobile app welcome/splash screen. Background: soft gradient from pale mint #E8F5F0 to lighter #F0FAF5. Layout: vertical stack — top subtitle, large centered title, illustration, bottom subtitle. Top subtitle '温暖，倾听，共情，接纳' in small (~14px) teal #5A7A78, letter-spaced, centered. Main title '情绪树洞' in large (~36px) bold teal #3BA99C, serif font, centered. Bottom subtitle '释放你的情绪 / 说出你的故事' in ~15px, #5A7A78, centered. Central illustration: whimsical storybook scene with watering can, girl in blue dress, orange fox with top hat, green hills, pale blue sky, soft muted green/teal palette with warm orange fox accent. No CTA button visible in screenshot — purely introductory/splash screen. Overall feel: dreamy, serene, healing, magical storybook aesthetic.
project.designRead: mobile welcome splash / emotional wellness seekers / warm healing storybook / low density / avoid clinical/medical aesthetic

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: teal #3BA99C used for main title and brand identity
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: single teal primary with warm orange #E8914F accent from fox illustration only

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: soft rounded, storybook feel, no hard edges
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: serif display for title, sans-serif body, Chinese-first
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: no shadows, flat layered design with soft background gradient

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: no nav bar — pure splash screen
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: Noto Serif SC for titles, PingFang SC for body

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Healing storybook splash screen with teal primary, serif display font, whimsical illustration, centered vertical layout

pages.title: 情绪树洞 - 欢迎页
pages.visualNorthStar: Dreamy storybook splash — centered vertical layout with serif title, soft teal palette, whimsical illustration filling the lower 60% of screen
pages.compositionPattern: vertical-center-stack: subtitle → title → illustration → bottom tagline

assets.semanticDescription: Whimsical storybook illustration with watering can, girl in blue dress, orange fox, green hills — the emotional tree hollow scene
